infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Attach photos of the problem to your request.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Record a voice note describing the problem or the fix.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Attach screenshots or photos to your request.

plugins.cameraPermission: kloop uses the camera to scan workspace QR codes and attach photos.

plugins.photosPermission: kloop attaches photos you pick to your requests.

plugins.microphonePermission: kloop records voice notes you attach to requests.
